summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CodeForge AI platform - French AI code generation platform with Cyber Yellow theme. Backend APIs mostly functional, frontend UI excellent, authentication working. Critical LLM budget issue blocking AI functionality.

critical_bugs.issue: LLM budget exceeded - 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.44548650000000006, Max budget: 0.4'
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all AI chat functionality and code generation

minor_issues.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for POST requests
minor_issues.impact: Incorrect HTTP status code for resource creation

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 error when project has no generated code
minor_issues.impact: Export functionality requires code generation first

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Cyber Yellow theme (#E4FF00)
Google OAuth login button present and functional
Authentication redirect to Emergent Auth working
Project creation and management UI working
AI status indicator showing 'IA en ligne'
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix LLM budget exceeded issue. The Emergent LLM key has reached its budget limit (0.4), blocking all AI functionality including chat and code generation. Need to either increase budget or provide new API key.

success_percentage.backend: 71.4% (5/7 core endpoints working, LLM budget issue blocking AI features)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components and authentication working perfectly)
